criteria.text: a scheduled probe emits a `kind: runtime` evidence record keyed by (story, AC) with `provenance.source: ci`, carried in the derived tree and queryable by (story, AC) at close time — rollup.json is its first durable residence (03 §Runtime evidence residence, the ratified hard constraint)

`verdi close` and the fold consume a runtime record exactly as they consume static/behavioral: a story declaring `evidence: [runtime]` folds from pending to evidenced once a matching `source: ci` runtime record is present, proven end to end hermetically
